title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: firewalld bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for firewalld is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: firewalld is a firewall service daemon that provides a dynamic customizable firewall with a D-Bus interface.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): prevent rules from getting flushed when a rich rule with an invalid ipset is added (JIRA:RHEL-67103)  Firewalld loads ipset which logs an "Unmaintained driver" warning [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-92450)  CI: omit "scale" tests from parallel run, run separately and serially [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-92451)  Reloading firewalld immediately after restarting it terminates it [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-92452)  firewall-config: Rich Rule creation is broken (JIRA:RHEL-94646)  firewalld: rebase to latest 2.3.z (JIRA:RHEL-96068)

fixes.description: prevent rules from getting flushed when a rich rule with an invalid ipset is added
firewall-config: Rich Rule creation is broken

full_text:
An update for firewalld is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

firewalld is a firewall service daemon that provides a dynamic customizable firewall with a D-Bus interface.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): prevent rules from getting flushed when a rich rule with an invalid ipset is added (JIRA:RHEL-67103)  Firewalld loads ipset which logs an "Unmaintained driver" warning [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-92450)  CI: omit "scale" tests from parallel run, run separately and serially [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-92451)  Reloading firewalld immediately after restarting it terminates it [rhel-10] (JIRA:RHEL-92452)  firewall-config: Rich Rule creation is broken (JIRA:RHEL-94646)  firewalld: rebase to latest 2.3.z (JIRA:RHEL-96068)
